# GetIdlePolicy

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the pipe’s current idle timeout.

## Declaration

```swift
kern_return_t GetIdlePolicy(uint32_t * idleTimeoutMS);
```

## Parameters

- **idleTimeoutMS**: A pointer to store the current idle timeout in milliseconds.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/kIOReturnSuccess] on success, or another value if an error occurs. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/error-codes].

## Managing the Pipe’s Idle Policy

- **SetIdlePolicy**: Sets the pipe’s desired idle timeout.

items.description: Sets the pipe’s desired idle timeout.
